query: garish toxic color combination unsettling photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — garish toxic color combinations, unsettling palettes

response.objective_caption: A young child with blond hair is positioned at the center of the frame with eyes tightly closed and mouth open, surrounded on all sides by glossy purple balloons that fill the image. Bright circular light reflections are visible on the balloon surfaces. Strands of the child's hair are visible near the top of the frame, and a portion of a checkered garment collar is visible below the chin.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young child with blond hair is positioned at the center of the frame, visibly crying with eyes squeezed shut and mouth open in distress, surrounded on all sides by glossy purple balloons that fill the frame. Bright specular hotspots from harsh flash lighting reflect off the balloon surfaces. The child's anguished facial expression conveys intense negative emotion.
